title: [MTR4] The Dual Side LRV
description: A Version of MTR's LRV's with doors on both sides!
body:
A Version of MTR's Light Rail Veichles with Doors on both sides.

This Allows for both Island and Side Platforms without changing Driving sides.

# Current Stock:

## Phase 1

Unrefurbished

Refurbished

## Phase 2

Normal

## Phase 3

Normal

## Phase 5

Normal
